items.title: GitHub says hackers stole data from thousands of internal repositories
items.summary: The code hosting giant GitHub said it was investigating a breach, but said there was no evidence of customer data theft.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: ‘Perfect Storm’: How Trump's Aid Cuts Are Fueling the Ebola Outbreak
items.summary: One health provider who works on the ground says that basic medical equipment like masks and hand sanitizers are in short supply due to funding cuts.
